evidence_boundary: local-only offline execution evidence; no providers, models, tokens, external APIs except read-only GitHub repo-state verification, browser automation, deployment, credentials, Google Sheets, runtime/provider changes, prior evidence mutation, or readiness claims

metadata.dry_run_harness_contract: readiness-only; wrapper remains selected next lane
metadata.non_execution_boundary: no commands executed; no providers, external APIs, browsers, deployment, billing, credentials, Google Sheets, source-artifact mutation, or evidence promotion

preflight_result_summary.evidence_boundary: local-only offline documentation/evidence packet; no providers, models, tokens, external APIs except read-only GitHub repo-state verification, browser automation, deployment, credentials, Google Sheets, runtime behavior changes, provider routing changes, prior evidence mutation, or readiness claims
